description: Grok chat — Tiptap/ProseMirror contenteditable input, stable Submit aria-label
notes: Earlier probe mistakenly identified a hidden accessibility textarea. Real input is div.tiptap.ProseMirror[contenteditable='true']. Placeholder on fresh page: 'What's on your mind?' (may vary). Submit button has stable aria-label='Submit'. Use Input.insertText (CDP) for typing — ProseMirror requires isTrusted events.

prompt_input.description: Tiptap/ProseMirror contenteditable div — confirmed on fresh chat page

send_button.description: Send/submit button — stable aria-label='Submit', disabled when input empty

stop_button.description: Stop generation — selector unconfirmed, needs calibration during active generation

response_container.description: Last Grok response — confirmed: [class*='markdown']:last-of-type. 2 markdown elements per response (thinking + answer); last-of-type gives the answer.
response_container.notes: Confirmed 2026-04-06. Grok responded in 377ms to YESHIE_TEST.
